title: Recruitment Executive
description:
About Us

Centre for Seniors (CFS) is a Social Service Agency with Charities Status, dedicated to helping seniors remain meaningfully engaged in work and in life. We provide a range of services to support seniors in navigating major work-life transitions and to support employers in building cohesive intergenerational workplaces.

Job Title: Recruitment Executive (Employment Services)

As a Recruiter, you will play a pivotal role in connecting mature workers with suitable job placements. You will work closely with various industries and companies to advocate for the value of mature workers and encourage potential employers to consider hiring from our talent pool.

Department: Placement Team

Reports To: Employment Sector Lead

Stakeholders: Corporate clients, and mature job seekers

Job Summary:

The Recruitment Executive is responsible to match job opportunities with mature job seekers, follow up on post placement review to address employment concerns. Provide recruitment and give recommendation on necessary training to equip mature job seekers. 

Key Responsibilities:

1.       Sourcing and Screening: Actively seek out and identify potential job openings that align with the skills and experience of mature workers. Conduct thorough screening processes to assess candidates' qualifications and suitability for specific roles

2.       Candidate Matching: Match qualified mature workers with appropriate job opportunities based on their skills, experience, and career aspirations. Provide guidance and support to candidates throughout the job application process.

3.       Advocacy and Outreach: Represent CFS at industry events, conferences, and job fairs to raise awareness about the value of mature workers. Develop and maintain partnerships with community organizations, government agencies, and other relevant stakeholders.

4.       Performance Tracking: Maintain Job seekers database, monitor and track the success of placements to measure the impact of CFS’ efforts.  Analyse data to identify areas for improvement and inform future strategies.

5.       Meet Monthly  Target: number of candidates placed to available positions monthly.

Qualifications & Skills

o   Bachelor’s degree in human resources, Business Administration, or a related field.

o   More than 1 year experience in recruitment or human resources, preferably with a focus on mature worker placement.

o   Understanding of labour market trends and industry dynamics.

o   Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build relationships with both candidates and employers.

o   Strong organizational and time management skills.

o   Passion for promoting age diversity in the workplace and a commitment to social justice.

o   Driven and target oriented, sales is second nature to you.

Additional Skills (Preferred)

o   Experience with applicant tracking systems (ATS) and job boards.

o   Knowledge of diversity and inclusion initiatives.

o   Certification in human resources or recruitment.

Application Process:
If you are a passionate and results-oriented individual who shares our commitment and vision, we encourage you to apply for this
exciting opportunity.

Interested candidates to submit resume with a cover letter highlighting relevant experience and vision for position applied for. Please email to cheryl_ng@cfs.org.sg.  Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
Centre For Seniors (CFS) is a non-profit, Social Service Agency (SSA) that is committed to promoting the total well-being of older persons in Singapore, specially their vocational, financial and psycho-social health.

CFS manages programmes, activities, and projects that help promote an active ageing culture in Singapore.  A key aspect of the current services offered includes the various training programmes to encourage and prepare older persons to remain employable for as long as possible, as well as job placement to help senior job seekers find suitable jobs.

CFS also focuses strongly on research and advocacy regarding seniors, including the areas of physical and mental needs, and workplace issues.
postedCompany.name: Centre for Seniors
